profile_purpose: Inform article writing so that content resonates with independent car rental operators and drives engagement and conversion.
who_they_are: Independent car rental business owners in the UK operating between 5 and 100 vehicles. Not franchise operations — privately run firms serving local markets, often alongside other automotive services. Asset-heavy businesses where every vehicle needs to earn its keep.
what_they_care_about: Knowing exactly where every rental vehicle is at all times
Recovering vehicles quickly when a customer goes silent
Protecting assets from damage, theft, and misuse
Reducing insurance costs on a large vehicle portfolio
Having evidence when a customer disputes damage or an incident
core_pains_to_address: Customers driving outside agreed areas or taking vehicles abroad
Vehicles returned with damage and no clear evidence of when or how
Theft or abandonment with no way to locate the vehicle quickly
Insurance premiums that do not reflect the security measures in place
No real-time visibility across the fleet during peak periods
beliefs_to_align_with: Every vehicle is an asset — it needs to be protected like one
Real-time tracking is the difference between recovering a vehicle and writing it off
Evidence protects the business in customer disputes
Better security data should translate into better insurance terms
objections_to_pre-empt: Will customers be put off knowing vehicles are tracked?
How quickly can I actually locate a vehicle if something goes wrong?
Is the hardware reliable enough for vehicles that are constantly in use?
What is the total cost once installation and platform fees are included?

use: Asset protection framing — vehicles are investments, not just transport
Rental-specific scenarios — late returns, damage disputes, geographic boundaries
UK market context — insurance premiums, fleet financing, consumer rights
avoid: Driver behaviour framing — less relevant for rental than for managed fleets
Consumer tracking language — this is a B2B asset management conversation
Overpromising on customer reaction to tracking disclosure
Generic fleet management language that could apply to any industry

conversion_goal: Reader sees tracking and security as essential infrastructure for their business, not an optional add-on, and reaches out to understand what a Traknova setup would look like for their fleet size.
